requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence and EU-CE Environmental Requirements for Malta PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据与马耳他欧盟CE环境要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據與馬耳他歐盟CE環境要求

summary.en: For Malta, inverter safety files should be prepared for the supplied model or family using IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence and then positioned under the EU CE pathway used in Malta practice. Oversight in practice involves MCCAA Standards & Metrology alignment, REWS technical expectations, and Enemalta project interface coordination. Evidence should include manuals, nameplate ratings, electrical protection logic, earthing methods, installation instructions, and environmental assumptions for Malta's coastal sites, including salt mist and high humidity effects. The 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid setting and EU interoperability practice (Type 2/CCS2 interfaces) should be explicitly reflected.
summary.zh: 针对马耳他，安全文件应围绕出口型号或系列，基于IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据，并按马耳他实践中的EU CE路径组织。实施监管通常涉及MCCAA标准与计量体系对接、REWS技术要求和Enemalta项目接口协同。证据应包括说明书、铭牌参数、保护逻辑、接地方式、安装指导以及马耳他沿海站点的环境假设，如盐雾和高湿影响。需明确反映230/400V、50Hz电网条件及欧盟互联接口实践（Type 2/CCS2）。
summary.zht: 針對馬耳他，安全文件應圍繞出口型號或系列，基於IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據，並按馬耳他實務中的EU CE路徑組織。執行監管通常涉及MCCAA標準與計量體系對接、REWS技術要求和Enemalta項目接口協同。證據應包括手冊、銘牌參數、保護邏輯、接地方式、安裝指引以及馬耳他沿海站點的環境假設，如鹽霧和高濕影響。需明確反映230/400V、50Hz電網條件及歐盟互聯接口實務（Type 2/CCS2）。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 where battery coupling applies
MCCAA, REWS and Enemalta project environmental and interconnection documentation requirements

summary.en: China safety documentation generally references GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and domestic certification schemes (CQC/CGC) plus CNAS lab reports. These support domestic or China-export baseline screening but are not direct substitutes for Malta IEC 62109 type-test evidence and EU-CE positioned project files. Chinese assumptions may be tied to 220/380 V and configurations not aligned with Malta's coastal environmental and grid requirements.
summary.zh: 中国安全文件通常参考GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004及国内CQC/CGC自愿认证、CNAS实验室报告。它们可支持中国国内或国内外贸基础筛选，但不能直接替代马耳他IEC 62109型式试验证据及EU CE导向项目文件。中国资料可能基于220/380V及与马耳他沿海环境和电网要求不一致的配置。
summary.zht: 中國安全文件通常參考GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004及國內CQC/CGC自願認證、CNAS實驗室報告。它們可支持中國國內或中國外貿基礎篩選，但不能直接替代馬耳他IEC 62109型式試驗證據及EU CE導向專案文件。中國資料可能基於220/380V及與馬耳他沿海環境和電網要求不一致的配置。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC domestic certification regimes and domestic CNAS testing contexts

gap.en: Gap: Chinese-only IEC/standards context does not automatically satisfy Malta safety review. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/62109-2 type-test evidence and CE-marking-linked safety rationale for the exact exported unit, including label language, manual updates, protection-device coordination, and marine-environment controls. Any changes to enclosures, terminals, surge protection, firmware, or nameplate ratings for Malta deployment require refreshed safety documentation.
gap.zh: 差距：仅有中国GB/T/NB/T或其他国内安全背景不足以满足马耳他安全审查。出口商应提供所出口机型或系列的IEC 62109-1/62109-2型式试验证据及EU CE相关安全论证，并补充标签语言、手册更新、保护装置协调及海洋环境控制。任何对马耳他部署涉及外壳、端子、浪涌保护、固件或铭牌额定值的变更都可能需要更新安全文件。
gap.zht: 差距：僅有中國GB/T/NB/T或其他國內安全背景不足以滿足馬耳他安全審查。出口商應提供所出口機型或系列的IEC 62109-1/62109-2型式試驗證據及EU CE相關安全論證，並補充標籤語言、手冊更新、保護裝置協調及海洋環境控制。任何對馬耳他部署涉及外殼、端子、浪湧保護、韌體或銘牌額定值的更改都可能需要更新安全文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for project-level approvals where REWS, Enemalta, lenders, insurers, or EPC packages require IEC 62109 safety evidence and EU CE-aligned environmental suitability
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T/NB/T/CQC/CGC safety documentation is not automatically acceptable for Malta CE-aligned grid projects

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely only on Chinese domestic safety documentation for Malta shipments. Provide IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 evidence tied to Malta's 230/400 V, 50 Hz configuration, including coastal ingress-protection, humidity, corrosion, and thermal-derating controls, then validate against current REWS and Enemalta interconnection safety expectations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 马耳他出口不要仅依赖中国国内安全文件。应提供与马耳他230/400V、50Hz配置匹配的IEC 62109-1与IEC 62109-2证据，并包含沿海防护、湿度、腐蚀和热降额控制，再按当前REWS和Enemalta并网安全要求进行核验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 馬耳他出口不要僅依賴中國國內安全文件。應提供與馬耳他230/400V、50Hz配置匹配的IEC 62109-1與IEC 62109-2證據，並包含沿海防護、濕度、腐蝕和熱降額控制，再按現行REWS和Enemalta併網安全要求進行核驗。
